name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype v1 Policy
governing_principle: A static prototype may show future form. It must not create future function.
identity_principle: The prototype must make Hoax.ai's evidence chamber visible without making Hoax.ai look like a detector.
static_only_policy: Static HTML and CSS only. No JavaScript, forms, inputs, upload controls, network calls, storage, analytics, API calls, generated outputs, or interactive classification.
non_public_policy: Not linked from public site, not in sitemap.xml, not registered as public route, not presented as workbench launch.

non_authorization_rules.statement: Prototype v1 does not authorize public workbench, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, routes, sitemap, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, public tool behavior, or production readiness.
